framework.name: CAAM positions itself as GNAP extension, not competitor
framework.description: CAAM explicitly frames itself as a 'GNAP Extension for Non-Deterministic Clients' — evidence of complementary rather than competing scope. Also positions as complementary to OAuth 2.1/Token Exchange (single-hop) by adding multi-hop delegation. This is consolidation signal, not fragmentation.
framework.raw_quote: CAAM is not intended as a replacement for existing identity, authorization, or attestation protocols. It functions as an orchestration profile
